name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing instead of manual invoicing and payment tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Cash flow gaps due to delayed invoicing and payment processing.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Cash flow gaps due to delayed invoicing and payment processing.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing instead of manual invoicing and payment tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual invoicing and payment tracking using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing instead of manual invoicing and payment tracking using spreadsheets.
